mano_cua.result_summary: Log面板在基础Tic-Tac-Toe游戏中正常工作，53步操作无崩溃无报错。但该bug需要使用stages的游戏(setStage/endStage)才能触发ctx[6].join错误，示例应用的Tic-Tac-Toe不使用stages(activePlayers始终为null)，无法验证
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After clicking through all 5 log entries including the game-ending move, the console showed No errors and No warnings. The Log panel functioned correctly. However, the ctx[6].join error requires games using stages (setStage/endStage), which the example Tic-Tac-Toe doesn't use.
